meta.next_session: 2026-06-30 3:30 PM PDT (After-Hours) — session recap, earnings/news sweep, stop audit, tomorrow's top 3

thoughts.label: SAFE MODE LIFTED — FRESH MATRIX AFTER 3 MISSES
thoughts.text: A fresh signal matrix landed at 8:23 AM PDT (computed_at 15:23Z), ~2h25m old at this 10:47 AM Midday Check — under the §2.5 3-hour limit, so SAFE MODE lifts for the first time after three consecutive engine misses. The scheduled 5:50 AM run still did not fire on time; the engine is producing matrices off-cadence. All 7 held positions are present with no error field. Entries are permitted in principle again.

thoughts.label: RECONCILED 7 POSITIONS — JEPQ DRIP SEED ADDED
thoughts.text: Broker now shows 7 positions vs the 6 in memory: a new JEPQ position (0.587772 sh @ $61.25, $36 market buy, placed_agent=agentic, filled 08:26 AM PDT) — an interim agentic session executed the long-pending DRIP build and did not commit memory. Broker is truth (§5.1); JEPQ reconciled in. LAB stop/gap scan CLEAR: INTC +10.8%, ARKK +4.0%, NVDA −0.8% (still +4.4% above its $190.04 stop). CORE/DRIP carry no stops (§13/§15.4).

thoughts.label: DRIP UNDERWEIGHT CLOSED FROM −30pp TO −6.4pp
thoughts.text: The JEPQ seed lifts DRIP from 0% to 23.6% (target 30%) — the income sleeve is finally live. Next deposit should prefer a dividend-growth name (SCHD, currently Z −1.08 = good add timing) to balance the covered-call start, once the dividend engine populates streak/payout so the §15.3 screen can be verified.

thoughts.label: NO CAPITAL FOR NEW ENTRIES — LAB ALSO OVER CAP
thoughts.text: Buying power is $0.37 (the $36 cash was deployed into JEPQ), so no entry is fundable this session regardless of gate. Separately, LAB sits at 26.0% vs its 20% Accumulation cap, so even a 4/5 gate (NET, SNOW, MU all read 4/5 on the fresh matrix) would not authorize a single-stock add — §17.3 forbids force-selling to rebalance. Fresh capital, when it arrives, routes to underweight DRIP.

thoughts.label: TAPE NEUTRAL, MOMENTUM LAGGING PRICE
thoughts.text: Composites sit −0.1 to −0.4 across the book (NVDA −0.381, MSFT −0.508, TSM/AVGO BEARISH) while prices rallied on the day (INTC +7.8%, SOXX +4.2%, QQQ +1.6%). MACD is broadly Bearish even on up days — momentum is lagging price. No name carries a decisive long edge.

learned_patterns.pattern: After three consecutive scheduled misses, the engine produced a fresh matrix at 8:23 AM — but the 5:50 AM scheduled run still did not fire. Runs are landing off-cadence. SAFE MODE correctly lifted for this midday session, but the cron/runner is still unreliable; scheduled 5:50 AM / 3:20 PM firings remain the fix.

The long-pending DRIP seed finally executed (JEPQ $36 agentic buy), closing the DRIP underweight from -30pp to -6.4pp. It went on the covered-call name (payout ratio N/A by rule) on yield alone — acceptable, since covered-call ETFs are exempt from the streak/payout screen, whereas dividend-growth names (SCHD etc.) still need that data populated.

An interim agentic session executed a fill (JEPQ 08:26 AM) but did not commit memory, leaving broker (7 positions) ahead of memory (6). Broker-vs-memory reconciliation at session start caught it and resolved to broker (§5.1). Lesson: commit memory in the same session as a fill.

Compound-gate status moves fast: RXRX fell 3/5→2/5 in one session purely on Z (1.42→1.65) and RSI (63.7→67.9) crossing their lines, while NET/SNOW/MU now read 4/5. Gates must be recomputed every session, never carried stale.

Composites sit -0.1 to -0.4 across the book while prices rallied on the day (INTC +7.8%, SOXX +4.2%). MACD is broadly Bearish even on up days — momentum is lagging price, a NEUTRAL/directionless tape rather than a confirmed uptrend.

Dividend yields now render sanely (the >100% anomaly is gone) so dividend_matrix is populated, but dividend_growth_streak=0 and payout_ratio=null persist for every DRIP name — the §15.3 screen (streak>=5, payout<80%) is still unverifiable for dividend-growth ETFs.

alerts.title: Signal Engine Off-Cadence — Scheduled 5:50 AM Run Missed
alerts.message: Matrices are now landing but not on schedule; the 5:50 AM run missed again. Investigate the GitHub Action cron/runner so the 5:50 AM and 3:20 PM runs fire on time and the 6:00 AM brief / 3:30 PM AH always have an in-window matrix.

alerts.title: Dividend Streak/Payout Still Missing
alerts.message: Yields render sanely but dividend_growth_streak=0 and payout_ratio=null persist for every DRIP name. The §15.3 screen (streak>=5, payout<80%) cannot be verified for dividend-growth ETFs (SCHD/DGRO/VIG/VYM); only covered-call names (JEPI/JEPQ, payout N/A) can be seeded on yield alone.
